title: Moonshot’s Kimi Upends Conventional Wisdom on US Lead Over China
description: At an event in Beijing earlier this year, some of China’s top artificial intelligence leaders warned that the country remained meaningfully behind the US in developing cutting-edge AI models, with one executive arguing that “the gap may actually be widening.”

title: China Joins Rush to Rethink the Smartphone for the AI Era
description: ZTE Corp. showcased for the first time a lineup of co-designed smartphones with built-in AI services, joining a growing number of Chinese companies trying to reimagine mobile devices with artificial intelligence at the core.

title: Apple Raises iPhone 17 Price by 10% in Japan as Yen Stays Weak
description: Apple Inc. raised the prices of iPhones and some other products in Japan as the local currency continues to hover near its lowest level in four decades.
